reviews.comment:
No podes viajar por ruta 7 sin parar a tomar un cafe aqui, la atencion es excelente, muy buen servicio sanitario y excelente confiteria... es un ACA

(Translated by Google)
You can't travel Route 7 without stopping for a coffee here. The service is excellent, the restrooms are very good, and the café is superb... it's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).
